title: Onboarding API route handler with CRUD operations for config, users, progress, notes, and team
purpose: Provides REST API endpoints for managing onboarding data including configuration, directories, graph, search, users, progress tracking, notes, and team information.
module_context: Exports a single async function handleOnboardingAPI that processes HTTP requests and routes them to appropriate service methods based on path and method.

steps.content: Parse the request URL and extract the path and project parameter.
Validate that the project parameter is present.
Initialize the OnboardingManager and OnboardingDbService with the project.
Route GET requests to config, directories, or graph endpoints to the manager.
Route GET requests to files endpoints to the pseudo database.
Route GET requests to search endpoint to the database service with query parameters.
Route GET and POST requests to users endpoints to the database service.
Route GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE requests to progress and notes endpoints to the database service.
Route GET requests to team endpoint to the database service.
IF no matching route is found, return a 404 error.
IF an error occurs during processing, log it and return a 500 error.
Ensure the database service connection is closed after processing.
Create and return a JSON response containing the error message with the specified HTTP status code.
